query:
SELECT subjectSlug, COUNT(*) AS skills,
       SUM(CASE WHEN gradeLevel='4' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS below,
       SUM(CASE WHEN gradeLevel='5' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS on_grade,
       SUM(CASE WHEN gradeLevel='6' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS stretch
FROM skillLadder
WHERE active = 1
GROUP BY subjectSlug;

SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM placementTasks WHERE active=1) AS active_placement_tasks,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT skillLadderId) FROM placementTasks WHERE active=1) AS skills_with_at_least_one_task,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM placementResponses) AS responses_recorded,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM placementResults) AS results_recorded;

SELECT subjectSlug, gradeEquivalent, LEFT(strengthsNote,100) AS strengths, LEFT(gapsNote,100) AS gaps, assessedAt
FROM placementResults
ORDER BY assessedAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
